response.overview: Martin is an agent in an adult movies industry, and while scouting at a nightclub, he meets Dasha. She shows him something incredibly talented in a restroom, and he starts to think of offering her a role in an adult movie. The industry has become very trendy lately, and he promises her that she will be a superstar and that her movies will blow up the network. However, after the audition and the release of the new movie, everyone finds out that Dasha is the Mayor's wife. Mayor Peter is horrified and watches a video of his wife, wondering what the cost of this will be in his upcoming elections. The movie with the Mayor's wife becomes the most talked-about topic everywhere.
response.title: Porn, I Love You!
